d:
Hepler enters Altered Form, dealing [[230%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within [[2]] tiles and taunting them for [[5]]s. He also gains [[4]] Spark stacks.
While Hepler is in Altered Form, Remedial Class and Extra Credit are enhanced and have shorter cooldowns, but each costs 1 Spark stack to cast. When Hepler runs out of Spark stacks, he reverts to his True Form, dealing [[230%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within [[2]] tiles and blinding them for [[5]]s.
Increases the damage dealt when entering Altered Form to [[260%]]<ATK>, and increases the damage dealt when reverting to True Form to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt when entering Altered Form to [[290%]]<ATK>, and increases the damage dealt when reverting to True Form to [[290%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt when entering Altered Form to [[320%]]<ATK>, and increases the damage dealt when reverting to True Form to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt when entering Altered Form to [[350%]]<ATK>, and increases the damage dealt when reverting to True Form to [[350%]]<ATK>.

While in True Form, Hepler unleashes destructive magic at an enemy, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage and reducing the target's Haste by [[60]] for [[3]]s.
While in Altered Form, Hepler strikes the target with powerful blows, dealing [[360%]]<ATK> damage to the target and enemies within [[1]] tile around them, and stunning them for [[3]]s.
While in True Form, increases the Haste reduction from Hepler's magic attack to [[70]]. While in Altered Form, increases the damage of Hepler's powerful blow to [[390%]]<ATK>.
While in True Form, increases the Haste reduction from Hepler's magic attack to [[80]]. While in Altered Form, increases the damage of Hepler's powerful blow to [[420%]]<ATK>.
While in True Form, increases the Haste reduction from Hepler's magic attack to [[90]]. While in Altered Form, increases the damage of Hepler's powerful blow to [[450%]]<ATK>.

While in True Form, Hepler casts a healing spell on the [[weakest]] ally, healing them for [[130%]]<ATK> HP per second for [[6]]s.
While in Altered Form, Hepler casts a healing spell on the [[3]] [[weakest]] allies and grants them toughened skin, healing them for [[130%]]<ATK> HP per second for [[6]]s and granting them a [[400%]]<ATK> shield for [[15]]s.
Increases HP restored by the healing spell to [[140%]]<ATK> per second and the shield value gained from toughened skin to [[480%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP restored by the healing spell to [[150%]]<ATK> per second and the shield value gained from toughened skin to [[560%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP restored by the healing spell to [[160%]]<ATK> per second and the shield value gained from toughened skin to [[640%]]<ATK>.
Reduces damage taken by [[9%]] during battle. While in Altered Form, further reduces damage taken by [[6%]].
Reduces damage taken by [[12%]] during battle. While in Altered Form, further reduces damage taken by [[8%]].
Reduces damage taken by [[15%]] during battle. While in Altered Form, further reduces damage taken by [[10%]].

When a battle starts, Hepler protects the [[frontmost]] adjacent allied hero. The first time that ally would take a [[fatal blow]], they instead ignore the damage. At the same time, Hepler heals the ally and grants them toughened skin for [[5]]s, and transforms them into a small animal that runs toward the back of the battlefield. While in animal form, the ally becomes [[invincible]] for [[3]]s.
Increases the duration of healing and toughened skin granted by this skill to [[7]]s.

Hepler gains ATK equal to [[30%]] of the protected ally's initial ATK, while that ally gains max HP equal to [[40%]] of Hepler's initial HP. The ATK Hepler gains from this skill cannot exceed [[80%]] of his own initial ATK.
Increases the duration of healing and toughened skin granted by this skill to [[9]]s.
Whenever Hepler spends Spark stacks, he and the protected ally permanently increase their Phys & Magic DEF by [[6%]] and reduce their damage taken by [[3%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
